zh.lifeSummary: 當William Pantulf於1151年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾布頓 奧 馮 希爾時，他的父親William Pantulf26歲，母親Burga Stuteville28歲。他和Joan Goldington至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他於1179年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾被列為sheriff。他去世於1224年12月28日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾維姆享年73歲。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When William Pantulf was born in 1151, in Breedon on the Hill, Leicestershire, England, his father, William Pantulf, was 26 and his mother, Burga Stuteville, was 28. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Joan Goldington. In 1179, his occupation is listed as sheriff in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 28 December 1224, in Wem, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Pantulf est né en 1151, à Breedon on the Hill, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, William Pantulf, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Burga Stuteville, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Joan Goldington. En 1179, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 28 décembre 1224, à Wem, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Pantulf 1151 in Breedon on the Hill, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Pantulf 26 und seine Mutter Burga Stuteville 28. Er hatte mit Joan Goldington mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1179 ist sein Beruf als sheriff in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 28. Dezember 1224 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Wem, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Pantulf è nato il nel 1151 nel Breedon on the Hill, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, William Pantulf, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Burga Stuteville, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Joan Goldington. Nel 1179, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 28 dicembre 1224, nel Wem, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni.

ko.Breedon on the Hill, Leicestershire, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 브리던  테 힐
ko.lifeSummary: William Pantulf(이)가 1151년 영국 레이스스터실르 브리던  테 힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Pantulf(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Burga Stuteville(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Joan Goldington(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1179년, 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 1224년 12월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 베에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Pantulf nasceu em 1151, em Breedon on the Hill, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Pantulf, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Burga Stuteville, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Joan Goldington. Em 1179, sua profissão aparece como sheriff em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 28 de dezembro de 1224, em Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos.

ru.Breedon on the Hill, Leicestershire, Eng: бридон он т хилл, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Pantulf родился в 1151 г. в местности бридон он т хилл, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Pantulf было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Burga Stuteville, 28. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Joan Goldington. В 1179 году он работал по профессии sheriff в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 28 декабря 1224 г. в местности вем, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет.
